header.titol: Software Developer at SATB2C | Computer Engineer

presentacio: Computer Engineer with a solid foundation in software development and one year of professional experience as a Full Stack Developer.
I have proven experience working on both the frontend and backend of web applications, delivering reliable and efficient solutions.

I consider myself a curious, proactive, and results-oriented person, eager to keep learning and growing in the field of software engineering and information technologies. I am passionate about clean code, teamwork, and taking on new challenges that allow me to apply my knowledge and acquire new skills.
My goal is to continue advancing my career in the technology sector, contributing value to innovative, high-impact projects.

descripcion: During this period, I expanded my role from refactoring legacy systems to leading R&D initiatives, workflow automation, and growth engineering. I led the architectural modernization of SATB2C's core platform, which also became the basis of my final degree project at the University of Girona, designing software and marketing solutions for international clients.

In software modernization and mobile engineering, I migrated the SAT Android app from jQuery to Framework7 and pure JavaScript, designing an offline-first architecture with SQLite to ensure full mobile operability and automatic cloud synchronization. I also led the frontend refactoring of the SAT corporate portal, removing Bootstrap and jQuery dependencies through CSS and pure JavaScript to optimize data grids.
I worked extensively with Apache Cordova to build and maintain multiple Android applications, administered MySQL databases, and executed complex data import processes for the main client.

In AI innovation and process automation, I integrated the Google Gemini API into the mobile app through a dynamic context window and an asynchronous STT/TTS voice interaction loop for hands-free diagnostics. I also designed backend automations with n8n, connecting AI chatbots with corporate processes such as automatic service creation and real-time holiday queries.
I redesigned the technical mobile solution into a new application adapted for sales teams and B2B sales workflows, and audited LLM token costs to ensure product scalability.

During my three-month internship, I worked extensively with MySQL databases: creating and modifying tables, managing keys, optimizing queries, and correcting data errors. On both the frontend and backend, I designed and improved complete forms, integrating conditional logic to optimize the user experience.

I developed end-to-end features in PHP, including database connections and Excel exports, and also participated in the management of user roles and permissions. In addition, I maintained direct contact with clients, interpreting their needs and proposing concrete improvements.

Other responsibilities included creating custom dashboards, generating test data, preparing features for production, and writing technical documentation. These tasks helped me grow both technically and personally, strengthening my autonomy, time management, and teamwork in a collaborative environment.

After successfully meeting the internship objectives, I specialized in web and mobile development for clients in the services sector, also participating in innovation initiatives, including an introduction to artificial intelligence technologies.
I provided personalized academic mentoring and technical training to a third-year Computer Engineering student at the University of Girona (UdG).

In software methodology and engineering, I provided advanced mentoring in Object-Oriented Programming, memory management with pointers, data structures such as stacks and queues, recursion, and technical diagram design for class, activity, and sequence diagrams.
In databases, I supported relational design and modeling through Entity-Relationship diagrams and SQL query optimization.
In computer architecture, I reinforced analysis of the internal operation of processors and low-level code development in Assembler.

In networks and interfaces, I taught communication protocols such as IP, TCP, HTTP, and web, basic infrastructure management with servers and routers, and fundamentals of multimedia and user interfaces.

descripcio: Graduated in Computer Engineering with an average grade of 7.8/10.
Four honors distinctions: Programming Paradigms and Languages, Industrial Informatics and Robotics, Management and Communication Skills, and Production Management and Logistics.
Excellent grades in Workplace Internship, Database Management Systems, and Digital Systems.

Final Degree Project: I developed and deployed a comprehensive architectural modernization for SATB2C's Android platform. I migrated a legacy jQuery system to Framework7 and pure JavaScript, designed an offline-first SQLite architecture for field technicians, and integrated the Google Gemini API to create an interactive hands-free voice assistant loop with STT/TTS.
Strengthened skills: hard work, organization, a solid technical and analytical foundation, teamwork, and problem solving.
Science and Technology Baccalaureate track, focused on developing analytical, logical, and problem-solving foundations.
Specific subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Technology, and Technical Drawing.
Research Project: an exhaustive analysis of the historical rigor and fidelity of the acclaimed miniseries "Band of Brothers".

certificats.titol: Certificate of completion of the course "Todo jQuery de novato a experto" (Udemy)
